Built on Tenth is an independent revenue intelligence site for HVAC, roofing, and plumbing companies in the United States. It publishes original analysis, benchmarks, calculators, and fixed-scope revenue leak audits for operators doing roughly $1M to $5M in revenue. Built on Tenth does not sell ad management services and has no incentive to recommend more ad spend.

Priority URLs:

https://www.builtontenth.com/services

https://www.builtontenth.com/tools/revenue-per-tech
https://www.builtontenth.com/tools/marketing-calculator

https://www.builtontenth.com/insights/hvac-cost-per-lead-by-channel-2026
https://www.builtontenth.com/insights/are-angi-leads-worth-it-for-roofing-companies
https://www.builtontenth.com/insights/plumbing-company-marketing-playbook
